ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "self_employed" INTEGER /* Whether the participant is self-employed */,
  "family_history" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has a family history of mental illness */,
  "treatment" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has received treatment for mental health issues */,
  "work_interfere" INTEGER /* How often work interferes with mental health (1-4 scale) */,
  "no_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the participant's company */,
  "remote_work" INTEGER /* Whether the participant works remotely */,
  "tech_company" INTEGER /* Whether the participant works for a tech company */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "date_of_survey" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "benefits" INTEGER /* Whether the participant's company provides mental health benefits (1-3 scale) */,
  "care_options" INTEGER /* Whether the participant knows the options for mental health care (1-3 scale) */,
  "wellness_program" INTEGER /* Whether the participant's company offers a wellness program (1-3 scale) */,
  "seek_help" INTEGER /* Whether the participant knows how to seek help for mental health issues (1-3 scale) */,
  "anonymity" INTEGER /* Whether the participant's company maintains anonymity for mental health issues (1-3 scale) */,
  "leave" INTEGER /* Whether the participant feels comfortable taking leave for mental health issues (1-3 scale) */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES mental_health_resources_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_resources_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_perceptions" (
  "perception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perception record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "mental_health_consequence" INTEGER /* Whether the participant believes mental health issues have negative consequences (0-2 scale) */,
  "phys_health_consequence" INTEGER /* Whether the participant believes physical health issues have negative consequences (0-2 scale) */,
  "coworkers" INTEGER /* Whether the participant would feel comfortable discussing mental health with coworkers (1-3 scale) */,
  "supervisor" INTEGER /* Whether the participant would feel comfortable discussing mental health with a supervisor (1-3 scale) */,
  "mental_health_interview" INTEGER /* Whether the participant would feel comfortable mentioning mental health in a job interview (0-2 scale) */,
  "phys_health_interview" INTEGER /* Whether the participant would feel comfortable mentioning physical health in a job interview (0-2 scale) */,
  "mental_vs_physical" INTEGER /* Whether the participant believes mental health is treated equally to physical health (0-2 scale) */,
  "obs_consequence" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has observed negative consequences from discussing mental health (0-2 scale) */,
  "perception_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the perception type */,
  "perception_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the perception */,
  "perception_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_perceptions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_perceptions_perception_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("perception_type_id") REFERENCES mental_health_perceptions_types ("perception_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" INTEGER /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" INTEGER /* Quality index for healthcare in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workplace_details" (
  "workplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workplace record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in (e.g., Tech, Finance, Healthcare) */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Location of the workplace (e.g., Office, Remote) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current role */,
  "work_environment" TEXT /* Work environment (e.g., open office, private office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workplace_details_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health history record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of mental health condition (e.g., Anxiety, Depression) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date treatment started */,
  "current_treatment" INTEGER /* Whether the participant is currently receiving treatment */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Effectiveness of the treatment on a scale (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_history_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_resources_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., Benefits, Care Options) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "resource_type_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the resource type */,
  "resource_type_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_perceptions_types" (
  "perception_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perception type */,
  "perception_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the perception type (e.g., Consequences, Discussions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the perception type */,
  "perception_type_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the perception type */,
  "perception_type_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the perception type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perception_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
